name: Suebi (Germanic)
notes: Suebi/Suevi. West Germanic people who established a kingdom in Gallaecia (NW Iberia, 411–585 CE). Germanic superstrate in Galician and Portuguese: ~200 place names and personal names, vocabulary (guerra, roubar, branco). Phonology reconstructed from Proto-West-Germanic (Piel 1937, d'Encarnação 1975).
